## XOn() function

Creates a subscription to an [XEvent](./x-components.xevent.md)<!-- -->, an array of [XEvent](./x-components.xevent.md) or a component property ( reacting to its changes via a watcher) filtering out the passed metadata, if any, and un-subscribes on the beforeDestroy hook.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function XOn<Event extends XEvent>(xEvent: Event | Event[] | ((component: Vue) => Event | Event[]), metadataFilteringOptions?: Partial<WireMetadata>): DecoratorFor<(payload: XEventPayload<Event>, metadata: WireMetadata) => void>;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  xEvent | Event \| Event\[\] \| ((component: Vue) =&gt; Event \| Event\[\]) | The [XEvent](./x-components.xevent.md)<!-- -->, an array of [XEvent](./x-components.xevent.md) or a component property. |
|  metadataFilteringOptions | Partial&lt;[WireMetadata](./x-components.wiremetadata.md)<!-- -->&gt; | The [WireMetadata](./x-components.wiremetadata.md) options to filter out a callback execution. |

<b>Returns:</b>

[DecoratorFor](./x-components.decoratorfor.md)<!-- -->&lt;(payload: [XEventPayload](./x-components.xeventpayload.md)<!-- -->&lt;Event&gt;, metadata: [WireMetadata](./x-components.wiremetadata.md)<!-- -->) =&gt; void&gt;

Decorator that creates a subscription to an [XEvent](./x-components.xevent.md) and un-subscribes on the beforeDestroy hook.

## Remarks

The decorated property needs to be public for type inference to work.
